---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / use case

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow pain-point you've hit.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like the app to do. Include UI sketches or references where helpful.

## Rulebook reference

Cite the relevant rulebook **section number(s)** (e.g. "rule 13.2.2 Trade Networks"). Please do **not** paste verbatim rulebook prose — copyright concerns.

## Expansion coverage

Which expansion(s) does this feature touch?
- [ ] Base
- [ ] Close Encounters
- [ ] Replicators
- [ ] All Good Things

## Workflow impact

How does this feature fit into the existing workflow? Does it replace a manual step? Does it need new settings/toggles?

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative designs or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or references to similar features in other apps.
